subject: AgencyOps Letter: quick sender-risk check before the next campaign
email_body:
Hi there,

You have a professional audience and likely sponsor inventory, so deliverability evidence is useful.

I run a fixed-scope service called InboxReady. It checks SPF/DKIM/DMARC posture, one-click unsubscribe readiness, bounce and complaint risk, and campaign-level blockers.

The first audit is $149 and comes back as a plain-English score, fix list, and CSV your team can keep.

If you send the domain and one recent campaign export, I can turn it into a fixed-price audit. Worth a quick look this week?

Best,
{{your_name}}
follow_up_1:
Hi there,

Quick bump. The useful part is not a long report; it is a short blocker list before the next campaign. For AgencyOps Letter, I would check authentication, unsubscribe path, bounces, and complaint risk first.

Should I send a sample format?
follow_up_2:
Hi there,

I will close the loop for now. If inbox placement or Gmail/Yahoo sender rules become a priority before a launch, the $149 InboxReady audit is built for a one-domain quick pass.

Best,
{{your_name}}
